---
title: "Peer-reviewed publications"
bibliography: publications.bib
nocite: |
  @*
---

For requests please contact me or send me a message on [Research Gate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Matheus-Januario-2)

<style>
#refs .csl-entry {
  margin-bottom: 1.3em;
  padding-left: 2.2em;
  position: relative;
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const refs = document.getElementById("refs");
  if (!refs) return;

  // 1. Sort entries by year, most recent first
  const entries = Array.from(refs.children);
  entries.sort((a, b) => {
    const yearA = parseInt((a.textContent.match(/\b(19|20)\d{2}\b/) || [0])[0]);
    const yearB = parseInt((b.textContent.match(/\b(19|20)\d{2}\b/) || [0])[0]);
    return yearB - yearA;
  });
  entries.forEach(e => refs.appendChild(e));

  // 2. Collapse spelled-out first names to initials (leave surnames untouched)
  //    Add any new co-author first names here as they show up.
  const firstNames = [
    "Matheus", "Jennifer", "Andressa", "Daniel", "Rodrigo", "Pedro",
    "Felipe", "Tamilie", "Fons", "Christian", "Peter", "Thiago",
    "Malin", "Renato", "Bruno", "James", "Jason", "Tiago"
  ];
  entries.forEach(e => {
    firstNames.forEach(name => {
      const re = new RegExp("\\b" + name + "\\b", "g");
      e.innerHTML = e.innerHTML.replace(re, name.charAt(0) + ".");
    });
  });

  // 3. Number them so the bottom (oldest) entry is 1,
  //    counting up as you go toward the top (newest)
  const total = entries.length;
  entries.forEach((e, i) => {
    const num = total - i;
    const label = document.createElement("span");
    label.textContent = num + ". ";
    label.style.position = "absolute";
    label.style.left = "0";
    label.style.fontWeight = "bold";
    e.style.position = "relative";
    e.insertBefore(label, e.firstChild);
  });

  // 4. Bold your last name wherever it appears
  const pattern = /\bJanuario\b/g;
  const walker = document.createTreeWalker(refs, NodeFilter.SHOW_TEXT);
  const nodes = [];
  let node;
  while (node = walker.nextNode()) nodes.push(node);
  nodes.forEach(n => {
    if (pattern.test(n.nodeValue)) {
      pattern.lastIndex = 0;
      const span = document.createElement("span");
      span.innerHTML = n.nodeValue.replace(pattern, m => `<strong>${m}</strong>`);
      n.parentNode.replaceChild(span, n);
    }
  });
});
</script>
